code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'?'/api':'http://localhost:8080/api'});export const getBeds=()=>API.get('/beds');export const getBedStats=()=>API.get('/beds/stats');export const getPatients=()=>API.get('/patients');export const admitPatient=data=>API.post('/patients',data);export const dischargePatient=id=>API.put("/patients/".concat(id,"/discharge"));
